---
applyTo: "README.md,README-local.md,.github/workflows/**/*.yml,.github/workflows/**/*.yaml"
---

When editing documentation or workflow files in this repository:

- Keep documentation in English and consistent with the actual project structure.
- If commands or scripts change, update both README files as needed.
- Keep CI and automation aligned with the existing GitHub Actions workflows in this repo (currently Dependabot auto-approve/auto-merge). If you add Node.js or Next.js checks, ensure they reflect the actual project setup.
